task_completion.description: The abdominal CT volume is loaded in 3D Slicer and displayed in the Red (axial) slice view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 3D Slicer interface showing an axial cross-section of an abdomen.

task_completion.description: The Markups ruler tool is active and a measurement line is drawn on the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler line (usually colored) is visible on the axial slice, or the Markups module is open with a line listed.

task_completion.description: The measurement is taken at the anterior midline, extending from the skin surface to the muscle fascia.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ruler line is positioned at the front center of the abdomen (belly button area), perpendicular to the skin, spanning the subcutaneous fat layer.

task_completion.description: The measured value is approximately 35.0 mm (allowing for slight variation, e.g., 30-40 mm).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The length of the ruler displayed in the view or the Markups table reads a value close to 35 mm.

task_completion.description: The markup is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog, file browser, or terminal output showing 'fat_thickness_measurement.mrk.json' being saved or existing in '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/'.

task_completion.description: The JSON report is created with the correct category ('Average') and measurement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal `cat` command showing the content of 'surgical_planning_report.json' with 'fat_thickness_mm' ~35 and 'surgical_category': 'Average'.

integrity.description: The agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to perform the measurement rather than purely scripting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor visible, menus open, or ruler interactively drawn on the canvas.

integrity.description: The value in the final report matches the value measured in the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The number shown in the Markups module/view matches the 'fat_thickness_mm' value in the JSON report.

integrity.description: The agent derived the value from the tool, not by guessing or hardcoding.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ruler tool is actually used on the image before the report is generated.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ground truth fat thickness for this case is 35.0 mm at vertebral level L3. This corresponds to the 'Average' surgical category (20-40mm). The measurement must be taken at the anterior midline of the abdominal wall. Visually, the ruler should span the dark gray fat layer from the outer skin line to the muscle boundary.
